emails.subject: Account Status
emails.body: Hi, Do you know the current status of the Bank One account for NG? Jim has been inquiring about this. Many thanks David Forwarded by David P Dupre/HOU/ECT on 06/30/2000 10:43 AM Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: James_Naughton@em.fcnbd.com 06/07/2000 02:19 PM

emails.subject: Re: Account Status
emails.body: Re: Account Status We are currently in negotiations with them. Please do not forward my emails to Bank One. Sara David P Dupre 06/30/2000 10:51 AM
